recommendations.title: ThanksKilling
recommendations.overview: A homicidal turkey axes off college kids during Thanksgiving break.

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: The Humans
recommendations.overview: Erik Blake has gathered three generations of his Pennsylvania family to celebrate Thanksgiving at his daughter’s apartment in lower Manhattan. As darkness falls outside and eerie things start to go bump in the night, the group’s deepest fears are lai

recommendations.title: Kill Theory
recommendations.overview: While celebrating a graduation at a secluded vacation home, a group of college students find themselves targeted by a sadistic killer who forces them to play a deadly game of killing one another in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Curtains
recommendations.overview: Six young actresses auditioning for a movie role at a remote mansion are targeted by a mysterious masked murderer.

recommendations.title: GTMAX
recommendations.overview: When a notorious gang of bikers recruits her brother for a heist, a former motocross champion must face her deepest fears to keep her family safe.

recommendations.title: Black Christmas
recommendations.overview: A group of sorority pledges are stalked by a stranger during their Christmas break. That is until the young women discover that the killer is part of an underground campus conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Boys in the Trees
recommendations.overview: On Halloween 1997, two estranged teen skaters embark on a surreal journey through their memories, dreams and fears.

recommendations.title: Masquerade
recommendations.overview: A young girl struggles to survive after a group of home invaders break into her house to steal her family's priceless artwork.

recommendations.title: The Goldsmith
recommendations.overview: Determined to rob a goldsmith, three young robbers break into his country house. The man and his wife turn out to be less defenseless than they seem.
